response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong testing discipline and broad polyglot background, but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with 8-12 years building high-performance, multi-threaded, message-broker-based industrial systems. C++ exposure is limited to a 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and there is no evidence of IEC 62443/SDL, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT), or relevant cybersecurity work. Core stack is JS/TS/DLang, which does not match the position's primary competencies.
strengths: Long tenure as senior/staff engineer with architecture and mentoring experience
Strong testing/TDD culture and developer-tooling contributions
Some networked/event-driven and high-throughput systems exposure (Sociomantic, GISCollective)
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only ~7 months in 2014-2015
No demonstrated IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity background
No experience with MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus, or industrial automation domain

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Senior engineering experience and architecture skills
